# Workflow Index

Profile: `public`

Generated index of visible `workflow` entities.

- [Adjudicate WorkLoop Slice](adjudicate-workloop-slice.md) - `workflow:adjudicate-workloop-slice`: Converts outcome and peer-review evidence into continue, repair, blocked, needs-stefan, done, or canceled decisions.
